description_long: This is a marble bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of a youthful male figure with finely detailed, wavy hair and classical facial features. The bust is broken at the top of the head and across the chest, revealing rough, unfinished stone at the damaged areas. The face is serene and slightly downcast, with a smooth, polished surface that contrasts with the rougher, chipped sections. The base is a simple rectangular plinth, also showing some wear and chipping. The back of the head and neck are sculpted with careful attention to the hair's texture, while the shoulders and chest are only partially rendered. The overall appearance suggests a classical or neoclassical style, reminiscent of ancient Roman or Greek portraiture.
description: A marble bust of a young male with detailed hair and classical features, partially damaged and mounted on a rectangular base. The sculpture has a smooth finish with visible chips and rough areas.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the detailed wavy hair and the rough, broken top of the head, with the neck and back of the shoulders visible.
description_view_1: Right profile view highlighting the facial features, ear, and the smooth transition from the head to the neck, with visible damage on the chest.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the serene face, downcast eyes, and the broken chest area, with the base and overall symmetry most apparent.
description_view_3: Left rear view focusing on the hair texture, the broken top, and the damaged area on the left shoulder and base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
